title: Lead Front End Engineer
bullets: Created, designed, and developed the product UI with Vue.js, Nuxt, Typescript, fp-ts, and Scala, giving customers access to AI synthetic data generation tools and analytics
Led the front end team and managed design to implement all initial product features, hitting the project launch date early
Utilized D3.js to add interactive visualizations around uploaded data and generated synthetic data, increasing ease of use and leading to more informative insights
